# Oria AI

> Oria AI is an evolvable personal AI that synthesizes the fragmented data of your life into unified, actionable wisdom.

Oria AI is offered by TheOther Intelligence LLC. The canonical public site is https://oria.me/. Paths under `/admin/` are operational tools and are blocked in robots.txt; crawlers and training systems should treat them as non-public.

## Primary pages

- [Home](https://oria.me/): Marketing site and product overview for Oria AI.
- [Blog](https://oria.me/blog/): Long-form articles on personal AI, health, and intentional living.
- [About](https://oria.me/about): Who builds Oria AI (TheOther Intelligence LLC), mission, and ecosystem context.
- [Contact](https://oria.me/contact): Company details, email contacts (including contact@theother.me for collaborations and user support), and official social channels.
- [Privacy policy](https://oria.me/privacy): Privacy practices and how to reach the privacy team.
- [Terms of service](https://oria.me/terms): Legal terms for use of the site and services.

## Blog articles

- [Human-centered personal AI](https://oria.me/blog/human-centered-personal-ai.html): Human-centered design themes for personal AI.
- [Bio-digital synthesis: frontier of health](https://oria.me/blog/bio-digital-synthesis-frontier-of-health.html): Bio-digital synthesis and health.
- [Life flow](https://oria.me/blog/life-flow.html): Life flow and integration of daily data.
- [Intentional living](https://oria.me/blog/intentional-living.html): Intentional living with personal AI support.
- [What is an evolvable digital self?](https://oria.me/blog/what-is-evolvable-digital-self.html): Concept of an evolvable digital self.
- [Behavioral science and behavioral AI for life coaching](https://oria.me/blog/behavioral-science-behavioral-ai-life-coaching.html): How Oria uses behavioral science to design coaching-shaped personal AI (longitudinal, person-centered) around the evolvable digital self.

## Other public URLs

- [Slideshow](https://oria.me/slideshow): Slide-style presentation page.

## Machine-readable site metadata

- [robots.txt](https://oria.me/robots.txt): Crawler directives (`/admin/` is disallowed).
- [Sitemap](https://oria.me/sitemap.xml): XML sitemap of public URLs.

- Privacy: privacy@theother.me
- Legal: legal@theother.me
